data.title: Coinbase acquiring Deribit talks reaches ‘advanced’ stage: Bloomberg
data.description:
In January, Deribit obtained a financial adviser to "review opportunities" after attracting attention from possible buyers.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347538/coinbase-acquiring-deribit-talks-reaches-advanced-stage-bloomberg?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: BaFin Halts Public Sales of Ethena’s Synthetic Dollar Over MiCAR Violations: Ethena Strikes Back!
data.description:
TL;DR BaFin has prohibited the public sales of Ethena GmbH’s USDe token, claiming it violates the European Union’s MiCAR regulations and markets unregistered securities. The protocol has been ordered to freeze the reserve assets and shut down its website, but secondary sales of USDe will not be affected. Despite the denial of its MiCA approval ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bafin-halts-public-sales-of-ethenas-synthetic-dollar-over-micar-violations-ethena-strikes-back/

data.title: BlackRock's IBIT Reportedly Increases Bitcoin Holdings in March 2025
data.description:
BlackRock's IBIT appears to have increased Bitcoin holdings in March 2025, prompting market discussions.
source: https://coincu.com/327840-blackrock-ibit-bitcoin-holdings-march-2025

data.title: BlackRock Increases Bitcoin Holdings by $145 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arkham has reported that BlackRock's IBIT-associated addresses have acquired an additional $145 million worth of Bitcoin. This move reflects the company's ongoing interest in expanding its cryptocurrency portfolio.

data.title: Will The Price Of Bitcoin Face Downtrend Amid Market Shifts?
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin (BTC) has shown reduced volatility, registering a slight 0.23% gain in the past 24 hours. The cryptocurrency’s price movement remains subdued as market participants anticipate its next major shift. While some investors fear a bear market, others remain optimistic about Bitcoin’s long-term outlook
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/will-the-price-of-bitcoin-face-downtrend-amid-market-shifts/

data.title: U.S. Government Removes Tornado Cash Sanctions
data.description:
Tornado Cash was sanctioned multiple times over allegations of helping Lazarus Group launder funds. The U.S. government has now removed these sanctions, marking a significant development in the ongoing debate around crypto privacy and regulation.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/u-s-government-removes-tornado-cash-sanctions

data.title: No longer on defense, Digital Chamber names new CEO as crypto policy shifts under Trump

data.title: Only 4 out of all 8.7M pump.fun tokens still hold $100M+ market cap
data.description:
Only four tokens out of 8.7 million launched on pump.fun since January 14, 2024, are still holding a market cap over $100 million, according to the project’s own data. Despite pulling in more than $600 million in total revenue, the vast majority of tokens created through the Solana-based meme coin launcher have either collapsed in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/4-out-of-8-7m-pump-fun-tokens-hold-100m/
